description: Year-end closing: depreciation, tax provisions, profit distribution via voucher postings
preflight: GET /ledger/account to find asset, depreciation, and tax accounts
endpoints: Use create_voucher — all year-end entries are journal postings
Tax provision: debit 8300 (tax cost), credit 2500 (tax payable)
tips: Both year-end and monthly closing are done via create_voucher. Parse ALL items from the prompt (depreciation, accruals/periodisering, tax provision, profit distribution, VAT settlement). Create one voucher per entry or one combined voucher. Use correct account numbers from the prompt. For periodisering/accruals: debit cost account, credit prepaid account (e.g. 1720). For depreciation: debit 6000-series, credit 1000-series asset. For VAT settlement: debit 2710 (output VAT), credit 2711 (input VAT), net to 2740 (VAT settlement). IMPORTANT: Always execute the bookings - never say you need more info if the amounts and accounts are given in the prompt.
